Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.state = 'CO' AND (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state) IN (SELECT up.bldg_id, up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", up.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up 
WHERE up.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND up.applicability = true GROUP BY up.bldg_id, up."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", up.state 
HAVING count(distinct(up.upgrade)) = 2)) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/22da2923a034bcce44a7ba6c786e501b9e9f52b3dffd6f7e2508363a808e144c/1823711c-7411-4b23-a47c-555ecc867acb/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
